.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(32, 30, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(30, 29, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(32, 30, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a2a, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#2a2a2a, color-mix(in srgb, #2a2a2a 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(254, 197, 9, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(32, 30, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(32, 30, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(32, 30, 66) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(221, 170, 3) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(43, 39, 81) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(42, 36, 88) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(30, 29, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(102, 44, 165) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(30, 29, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(30, 29, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
